properties.name: profile.api.enabled
properties.description: Description for profile.api.enabled.

properties.name: profile.service.enabled
properties.description: Description for profile.service.enabled.

properties.name: api.participant.enabled
properties.description: Enable/disable Participant REST API client bean.

properties.name: api.coalition.enabled
properties.description: Enable/disable Coalition REST API client bean.

properties.name: api.cluster.enabled
properties.description: Enable/disable Cluster REST API client bean.

properties.name: api.campus.enabled
properties.description: Enable/disable Campus REST API client bean.

properties.name: api.graphql.enabled
properties.description: Enable/disable GraphQL API client and GraphQL-based providers.

properties.name: api.client.enabled
properties.description: Enable/disable base authorized ApiClient bean.

properties.name: api.client.connect-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout for outgoing API HTTP clients.

properties.name: api.client.read-timeout
properties.description: Read timeout for outgoing API HTTP clients.

properties.name: api.client.call-timeout
properties.description: Overall call timeout for the authorized OkHttp API client.

properties.name: campus.service.enabled
properties.description: Description for campus.service.enabled.

properties.name: campus.scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Description for campus.scheduler.enabled.

properties.name: campus.scheduler.fixed-delay
properties.description: Fixed delay for campus scheduler polling, expressed as ISO-8601 duration (e.g. PT30S).

properties.name: campus.scheduler.participants-max-concurrency
properties.description: Maximum number of concurrent participant tasks for campus scheduler.

properties.name: campus.scheduler.timeout.global
properties.description: Global timeout for campus snapshot refresh phase, expressed as ISO-8601 duration.

properties.name: campus.scheduler.timeout.per-campus
properties.description: Per-campus timeout for snapshot refresh task, expressed as ISO-8601 duration.

properties.name: event.scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Description for event.scheduler.enabled.

properties.name: notify.delivery.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable sending notifications to bot while keeping online status polling active.

properties.name: coalition.refresh-ttl
properties.description: TTL for refreshing cached coalition data.

properties.name: participant.refresh-ttl
properties.description: TTL for refreshing cached participant profile data.

properties.name: projects.refresh-ttl
properties.description: TTL for refreshing cached student projects by login.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable scheduled refresh of projects for active student credentials.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.initial-delay
properties.description: Initial delay before first projects scheduler run, expressed as ISO-8601 duration.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.fixed-delay
properties.description: Fixed delay for projects scheduler polling, expressed as ISO-8601 duration.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.max-logins-per-run
properties.description: Maximum number of stale logins processed by projects scheduler in a single run.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.page-size
properties.description: Page size for scanning active logins from student credentials.

properties.name: projects.routing.graphql-school-id
properties.description: School ID that should use GraphQL projects provider (default MSK). Other schools use REST provider.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.batch-size
properties.description: Batch size of active logins processed concurrently by projects scheduler.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.graphql-batch-size
properties.description: Batch size for campuses processed via GraphQL projects provider.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.rest-batch-size
properties.description: Batch size for campuses processed via REST projects provider.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.task-timeout
properties.description: Timeout for a single project refresh task in projects scheduler.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.retry-attempts
properties.description: Number of attempts for failed or timed out project refresh tasks in a batch.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.retry-backoff
properties.description: Backoff delay between project refresh retry attempts.

properties.name: projects.scheduler.concurrency
properties.description: Thread pool size for projects scheduler.

properties.name: notify.scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Description for notify.scheduler.enabled.

properties.name: notify.scheduler.fixed-delay
properties.description: Fixed delay for notify scheduler polling, expressed as ISO-8601 duration (e.g. PT30S).

properties.name: credentials.scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable scheduled synchronization of missing student credentials via GraphQL.

properties.name: credentials.scheduler.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for credentials synchronization schedule.

properties.name: credentials.scheduler.zone
properties.description: Time zone used to evaluate credentials scheduler cron expression.

properties.name: credentials.scheduler.page-size
properties.description: Page size for platform API requests when loading campus participant logins.

properties.name: credentials.scheduler.batch-size
properties.description: Number of missing logins processed concurrently in one batch before awaiting completion.

properties.name: credentials.scheduler.concurrency
properties.description: Thread pool size for parallel credentials synchronization tasks.

properties.name: campus.workplace.provider
properties.description: Provider for workplace data: 'rest' for REST API, 'graphql' for GraphQL API.

properties.name: projects.rest.page-size
properties.description: Page size for REST requests to fetch participant projects by status.
